prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on furan (C₄H₄O, 9 atoms, charge 0, multiplicity 1) using DFT at tier 'standard' — B3LYP/def2-TZVP (density-fit RI, PySCF RKS) — in the gas phase, on the user-supplied geometry (single point, no re-optimization at this level).

**Headline result: HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV** (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, gas phase)

Key orbital energies:
- HOMO (index 17): −6.3597638 eV
- LUMO (index 18): −0.1024036 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap: 6.2573602 eV

Total electronic energy: −230.11429 Hartree (−6261.7289 eV). SCF converged in 9 cycles. Integrity check: trustworthy = true (all checks passed). No warnings reported — clean run.

Koopmans-derived descriptors: vertical IP = 6.3598 eV, vertical EA = 0.1024 eV, electronegativity = 3.2311 eV, chemical hardness = 3.1287 eV, softness = 0.3196 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 1.6684 eV.

CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard furan.xyz
